title: TC001-Sign out ends session and protected route access requires sign-in
description: Verifies that signing out ends the session and that attempting to access a protected module requires authentication.
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill email and password fields and submit the login form (use Enter since Sign in button index not found).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Marcel@08090')
        
        # -> Click the 'Sair' (Sign out) button to end the session (use interactive element index 556). After that, verify the app redirects to the login page and then attempt to access the Comercial module.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill the email and password fields and submit the login form using Enter so the dashboard can be re-verified.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Marcel@08090')
        
        # -> Navigate to /comercial and check whether the app redirects to /login (protected-route enforcement).
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/comercial", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Dashboard').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        assert '/login' in frame.url
        assert '/login' in frame.url
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Comercial page did not render: DOM remained empty with 0 interactive elements after multiple waits.
- Protected-route behavior could not be verified because there was no redirect or login UI on the /comercial page.
- Final verification step failed: unable to confirm that accessing /comercial requires authentication.

title: TC003-Global dashboard loads and shows core KPI cards
description: Verifies the central dashboard loads after login and displays high-level KPI cards for key modules.
code:

            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill the email field with the provided username, fill the password field with the provided password, and submit the form (send Enter).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Marcel@08090')
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert "/" in frame.url
        assert await frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[2]').is_visible()
        assert await frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[3]').is_visible()
        assert await frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[4]').is_visible()
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC005-Expand overdue tasks KPI to view overdue task list
description: Verifies clicking the overdue tasks KPI expands details and shows a list of overdue tasks.
code:

from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():

                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers

        )

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Marcel@08090')
        
        # -> Scroll the dashboard to reveal any hidden KPI cards and click the KPI area that contains task metrics (Desempenho Operacional / Overdue tasks) to expand details.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the KPI card for 'Desempenho Operacional' (index 925) / the task-metrics area to attempt to expand the overdue tasks details.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert '/' in frame.url
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Overdue tasks').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('xpath=//div[contains(@class,"overdue-tasks-details")]').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Overdue tasks KPI card not found on page (no element with text 'Overdue tasks' or 'Em Atraso').
- Clicking 'Desempenho Operacional' (index 925) did not open an overdue tasks details panel or list.
- No list or table containing overdue tasks is visible on the dashboard after interaction.

title: TC008-Create a new deal and see it appear on the Comercial kanban

code:

        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)

        frame = context.pages[-1]

        # -> Click on 'Comercial' in the main navigation to navigate to the Comercial board (element index 613).
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

ASSERTIONS:
- Comercial page returned an empty DOM after navigation, so no UI controls are available for creating a deal.
- Clicking the 'Comercial' main-nav element did not render the Comercial board; the page remained empty after interaction.
- Current tab URL is '/comercial' but the page has 0 interactive elements, indicating an SPA rendering failure.
- Two attempts to open Comercial were made and both resulted in an empty page, preventing further testing.

title: TC009-Comercial board shows all expected kanban columns
description: Verifies the Comercial page loads and displays the main pipeline columns (Prospecting, Negotiation, Won, Lost).
code:
import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode

                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers

        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text

        # -> Click the 'Comercial' navigation link (index 2168) to load the Comercial pipeline so the pipeline columns (Prospecting, Negotiation, Won, Lost) can be verified.

        # --> Assertions to verify final state

    finally:

        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST FAILURE

- Pipeline columns 'Prospecting', 'Negotiation', 'Won', and 'Lost' are not present on the page.
- No interactive elements were available on the Comercial page to perform verification.

        # Click element

        # Click element

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)

        # Input text

        frame = context.pages[-1]

        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('100,00')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div[5]/div/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Assert current URL contains '/'
        assert "/" in frame.url
        
        # Verify the presence of the expected text 'Nova Transação'
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div[3]/button').nth(0)
        text = (await elem.inner_text()).strip()
        if text != "Nova Transação":
            raise AssertionError("Feature 'Nova Transação' not found. Found element '/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div[3]/button' with text: " + repr(text))
        # If the text matches, ensure the element is visible
        assert await elem.is_visible()
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Operacional' link in the main navigation (index 546) to open the operational kanban view and then verify the kanban columns.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[4]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Kanban Geral' tab/button (index 1734) to open the kanban board so the kanban columns can be verified.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div/button[3]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        assert '/' in frame.url
        assert '/operacional' in frame.url
        await expect(frame.locator('text=To Do').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=In Progress').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Review').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await expect(frame.locator('text=Done').first).to_be_visible(timeout=3000)
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

description: Verifies a task can be created and appears as a new card on the kanban board.

import asyncio
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",         # Set the browser window size
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",        # Avoid using /dev/shm which can cause issues in containers
                "--ipc=host",                     # Use host-level IPC for better stability
                "--single-process"                # Run the browser in a single process mode
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(5000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/Users/MarcelSgarioni/Documents/Hefesto/Antigravity/Hefesto Software", wait_until="commit", timeout=10000)
        
        # -> Fill the email field (index 7) with 'marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com', fill the password field (index 8) with 'Marcel@08090', then submit the login form by sending Enter.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('marcelsgarioni@hefestoia.com')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/div/form/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Marcel@08090')
        
        # -> Click on the 'Operacional' link in the main navigation to open the kanban board.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/aside/div[2]/nav/a[4]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Kanban Geral' tab (index 1878) to open the Kanban board, then wait briefly for it to render so New Task controls become available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div/button[3]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Click the 'Nova Tarefa' button (index 2061) to open the New Task modal so the title/description/assignee fields become available.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Fill the task title and description, open the 'Responsável' dropdown, type 'a' to filter and select the first assignee, then click 'Criar Tarefa' to create the task.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[4]/div/div[2]/div/input').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('E2E Task - Operacional')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Input text
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[4]/div/div[2]/div[2]/textarea').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.fill('Created by automated UI test')
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[4]/div/div[2]/div[3]/div/div/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # -> Select the first assignee option from the 'Responsável' dropdown and click 'Criar Tarefa', then wait for the board to update.
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[4]/div/div[2]/div[3]/div/div/div[2]/div/div[2]/div').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Click element
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[4]/div/div[2]/div[7]/button[2]').nth(0)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(3000); await elem.click(timeout=5000)
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        # Verify we are on a logged-in page (contains "/")
        assert "/" in frame.url, f"Expected '/' in URL, got: {frame.url}"
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        # Verify we navigated to Operacional (URL contains "/operacional")
        assert "/operacional" in frame.url, f"Expected '/operacional' in URL, got: {frame.url}"
        await page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
        # Sanity-check: the 'Nova Tarefa' button (proxy that task feature is available) should be visible
        elem = frame.locator('xpath=/html/body/div[2]/main/div/div/div[2]/button').nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state='visible', timeout=5000)
        assert await elem.is_visible(), "'Nova Tarefa' button is not visible; task creation feature may be missing"
        # Unable to locate an element xpath for the created task text in the provided available elements list.
        # According to the test plan, if the feature/element is not available in the element list, report the issue and mark the task done.
        raise AssertionError("Cannot verify text 'E2E Task - Operacional': no matching element xpath provided in the available elements list. Reported issue and marking task as done.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
